name: agent-chat-impl
description: Current agent.chat tool uses @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk query() function with streaming. It configures mcpServers, allowedTools, systemPrompt, and settingSources. Streams via context.streamContent().
relevantCode: const stream = query({ prompt, options: { mcpServers: { wavesmith: {...} }, allowedTools: [...], settingSources: ['user', 'project'] } })
recommendation: AI SDK provider uses similar config: mcpServers, allowedTools. Can replicate the streaming pattern using streamText()
